6.error: Turn 6 is commonly called 'The Loop' not 'Toe' - this may be confusion with NASCAR terminology where the inner section is sometimes called the 'toe of the boot'

7.error: Turn 7 is part of 'The Loop' complex, not 'Heel' - the entire Boot section (T6-T7) is collectively called 'The Loop' or 'The Boot'

8.error: Corner 8 colloquial name should be 'The Bus Stop' not 'Turn 9' - numbering appears off by one

9.error: Corner 9 is second part of 'The Bus Stop' chicane, not 'Turn 10'

10.error: Corner 10 colloquial should be 'Turn 10' not 'Turn 11' - final corner before start/finish straight

gp.errors_summary: Colloquial names show systematic numbering confusion (off by one for T8-10). The Boot section corners (T6-T7) incorrectly named 'Toe/Heel' instead of 'The Loop'. Esses complex (T2-T5) not marked. Bus Stop chicane (T8-T9) not marked as complex.
